Patch Set 2:

did you want to apply this patch to oom:master ?

Patch Set 2:

I thought it should be cherry picked later, so we keep those branches in sync
Same issue with https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/oom/+/95068/ - Should I move to master instead?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> I thought it should be cherry picked later, so we keep those branches in sync
> Same issue with https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/oom/+/95068/ - Should I move to master instead?

yep we recommend to move to master and follow the procedure shared during the PTL meeting https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/PTL+2019-09-09?preview=/68547510/68548642/integration_verif_chain_for_PTL.pdf

stay on master
try staging => gating
if OK, release => gating
merge

oom staging branch was like the manifest before, almost impossible to keep sync, complex cherry picking,..
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

oom_releploy

Is this patch still relevant?

Patch Set 2:

It's already in master branch, do you plan to override staging with master anytime soon? 
Or should I cherry pick?

Patch Set 2: Verified+1 Code-Review+2

> It's already in master branch, do you plan to override staging with
 > master anytime soon?
 > Or should I cherry pick?

I am not aware of overriding plans.
I will merge then.
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
